Interactive discussion with user produced approved workflow design: shapiro-daily-analysis with 7 steps (run-pipeline, load-context, analyze-newsletters, score-markets, update-memory, send-alerts, write-analysis). Params: lookback_days (default 3). Tools: Gmail MCP (step 3 only), shapiro-runner script (step 1), shapiro-notifier script (step 6). No human gates — fully automatic. Context carry_forward: summary. Structs: shapiro-report, newsletter-analysis, scoring-result. The workflow replaces the existing /shapiro skill entirely. Source code at C:/Users/aleksandar.mavrov/Projects/ElliotWaveAnalyzer.
